name: Cauliflower with Fresh Tomatoes and Basil
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onions and tomatoes. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
2. Stir in the seasoning and basil. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the cauliflower florets for 4-5 minutes until tender.
4. Drain the cauliflower well before arranging it on a serving plate with the tomatoes and onions. Garnish with fresh basil leaves.
